## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New deterministic heuristic
- [ ] MCP tool/resource/prompt change
- [ ] Public schema change
- [ ] Documentation change
- [ ] Packaging/release change
- [ ] Test-only change
- [ ] Other

## Why

Explain the user need, maintainer need, or issue this PR addresses.

## Testing

Commands run:

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`

Add any relevant notes, failing tests, or skipped checks here.

## Diataxis impact

Which Diataxis modes are affected?

- [ ] tutorial
- [ ] how-to
- [ ] reference
- [ ] explanation
- [ ] not mode-specific

If this changes classification, audit, refactor, or planning behavior, describe the new expected behavior and the fixtures/tests added.

## Public API / schema impact

- [ ] No public schema changes
- [ ] Public schema changes are included and documented

If schemas changed, list the changed fields and any migration notes.

## Licensing and attribution

- [ ] No new Diataxis-derived content was added
- [ ] New Diataxis-derived content is short, operational, attributed, and compatible with CC-BY-SA 4.0
- [ ] No long verbatim upstream Diataxis text was copied

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private paths, or private repository data are included
- [ ] No hidden file writes or destructive behavior were added
- [ ] No external LLM calls, crawling, RAG, telemetry, persistence, or network access were added
- [ ] IDE/client examples use generic placeholders, not maintainer-local paths

## Additional notes

Add screenshots, output snippets, or follow-up tasks if useful.
